title: Post Gtano's for sale on Craigslist — help dad with his plan
html:
TL;DR

  • Eight-line September 2019 todo opening with Post Gtano's for sale on Craigslist — the family tile business is being put on the block, and 17-year-old Yahir is the listed implementer.
  • Inflection point in the family arc — by Sept 2019 Gtano's is already a sell-off candidate, Yahir is helping dad with his plan, and start making business sits two lines later as the personal-pivot.
  • Documents the family-translator role at full operating depth — Yahir handles the Craigslist post, the document organizing sibling note, the thank you to Travis, and a Facebook promotion in one list.
  • Earliest extant start making business line — the entrepreneurial-self separates from the family-business obligation in the same todo where the family business is being liquidated.
  • Third referenced surfacing of Gtano's across the corpus (March 27 news-relay, July 19 tile-as-keepsake, this) — promotes Gtano's from stub to real entity in this ingest.

Notes

The note is the business-liquidation memo written in a teenager's voice. Post Gtano's for sale on Craigslist / help dad with his plan / start making business — three consecutive lines that document the entire micro-arc: dispose of the failing inheritance, support the parental restructuring, plan the personal exit. The 17-year-old is operating as chief-of-staff to the household while simultaneously incubating his own founder-aspiration.

"-internships / -school work / -boys" is the personal-stack — three categories, no priorities, listed in same flat hierarchy as the family-business liquidation. The format is doing its native work: every life-strand at the same indent.

"-figure out thank to Travis" lands here too — Travis is the recurring fall-2019 confidant (entity page confirms cross-summary appearance in Sept 30 and Oct 8 notes); the "thank you" framing reinforces the mentor read.

The Facebook promotion (line 7) — post promotion on Facebook — likely refers to the same Gtano's listing or a related family-business marketing push; it's the only social-media-as-distribution mention in the late-Sept cluster.

Stub-to-real promotion

This ingest pushes Gtano's to its 3rd cross-summary mention. Per CLAUDE.md, Gtano's gets densified-in-promote here — the entity page is being created in this same ingest with full TL;DR and chronology.

Privacy note

Gtano's is the family business name, already public-facing (it was on Craigslist per this note). No redactions.

Connections

  • 2019 03 27 gtanos client son died · 2019 07 19 tile for alexandria — sibling Gtano's mentions
  • 2019 09 30 show dad all of the documents — same-week document-organizing
  • 2019 10 08 chinese practice — same-month Travis mention
  • gtanos · travis · fb marketplace · yahir family
  • grants pass teen era · bridge income strategies
